data.name: Kunoichi Demon Slayers
data.detailed_description:
In the not-so-distant future, demons suddenly appear worldwide, leaving chaos and destruction in their wake. But amidst the despair, a group of ninja warriors emerges to defend humanity. With the power to boost their strength, they vow to eradicate the demons, quell the chaos, and bring peace back to the world again.

The game features an in-depth traditional turn-based combat system, but grinding can be avoided at the player's discretion! All grinding can be skipped by selecting Assassin Mode, which allows you to skip most battles (except for bosses) while still receiving all of the usual rewards!
data.about_the_game:
In the not-so-distant future, demons suddenly appear worldwide, leaving chaos and destruction in their wake. But amidst the despair, a group of ninja warriors emerges to defend humanity. With the power to boost their strength, they vow to eradicate the demons, quell the chaos, and bring peace back to the world again.

The game features an in-depth traditional turn-based combat system, but grinding can be avoided at the player's discretion! All grinding can be skipped by selecting Assassin Mode, which allows you to skip most battles (except for bosses) while still receiving all of the usual rewards!
data.short_description: In the not-so-distant future, demons suddenly appear worldwide, leaving chaos and destruction in their wake. But amidst the despair, a group of ninja warriors emerges to defend humanity and vow to eradicate the demons.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.

data.legal_notice: © Kagura Games and Mikanbatake, All Rights Reserved.
